errors.recovery_action: Return to the sign-in screen and authenticate.
errors.safe_message: Sign in to continue.

errors.recovery_action: Open the permission details or contact an administrator.
errors.safe_message: Your role cannot perform this action.

errors.recovery_action: Choose an active authorization that covers the target.
errors.safe_message: Select a valid authorization before starting a scan.

errors.recovery_action: Create a new authorization or select another active record.
errors.safe_message: This authorization has expired.

errors.recovery_action: Stop the operation and review the revocation evidence.
errors.safe_message: This authorization has been revoked.

errors.recovery_action: Correct the target or update the authorization through the approved process.
errors.safe_message: The target is outside the approved scope.

errors.recovery_action: Stop the scan and review DNS and authorization evidence.
errors.safe_message: The resolved address changed outside the approved scope.

errors.recovery_action: Review the target resolution and retry only after the scope is valid.
errors.safe_message: The connection could not be bound to an approved address.

errors.recovery_action: Review collected evidence or create a separately approved scan plan.
errors.safe_message: The scan reached its approved request limit.

errors.recovery_action: Review partial evidence and start a new authorized scan when needed.
errors.safe_message: The scan was cancelled.

errors.recovery_action: Open the failure timeline and follow the recorded recovery step.
errors.safe_message: The scan stopped before completion.

errors.recovery_action: Use the approved redacted view; do not request unrestricted evidence in the UI.
errors.safe_message: Sensitive evidence is hidden.

errors.recovery_action: Return the assignment for independent reassignment.
errors.safe_message: This review assignment conflicts with your role or prior action.

errors.recovery_action: Wait for all assigned reviewers to submit decisions.
errors.safe_message: Required independent reviews are not complete.

errors.recovery_action: Assign an independent adjudicator and resolve the dispute.
errors.safe_message: Reviewer decisions disagree.

errors.recovery_action: Open the blocker list and resolve every hard blocker.
errors.safe_message: This release does not meet governance requirements.

errors.recovery_action: Stop release activity and investigate the immutable evidence chain.
errors.safe_message: Release evidence failed integrity verification.

errors.recovery_action: Resolve provenance, label, diversity, duplication, or leakage blockers.
errors.safe_message: The dataset is not ready for model evaluation.

errors.recovery_action: Keep the connector disabled unless a separately approved policy enables it.
errors.safe_message: External connectors are disabled.

errors.recovery_action: Use local fixtures or obtain explicit authorization through governance.
errors.safe_message: This operation is not allowed to use external network access.
